visualizerParams.title: Minimal Path Sum: Two Ways
visualizerParams.description: Find the minimal path sum from the top left to the bottom right of an 80x80 matrix by only moving right and down.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
def solution(matrix: list[list[int]]) -> int:
    """
    Returns the minimal path sum moving only right and down.
    matrix: a 2D list of integers.
    """
    rows = len(matrix)
    cols = len(matrix[0])
    
    # dp[i][j] will store the minimum path sum to cell (i, j)
    dp = [[0] * cols for _ in range(rows)]
    
    # Initialize starting point
    dp[0][0] = matrix[0][0]
    
    # Initialize first row (can only move right)
    for j in range(1, cols):
        dp[0][j] = dp[0][j-1] + matrix[0][j]
        
    # Initialize first column (can only move down)
    for i in range(1, rows):
        dp[i][0] = dp[i-1][0] + matrix[i][0]
        
    # Fill the rest of the dp table
    for i in range(1, rows):
        for j in range(1, cols):
            dp[i][j] = matrix[i][j] + min(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1])
            
    return dp[rows-1][cols-1]


if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Small example test
    test_grid = [
        [131, 673, 234],
        [201, 96, 342],
        [630, 803, 746]
    ]
    print(f"Minimal path sum: {solution(test_grid)}")
visualizerParams.finalCode:
def solution(matrix: list[list[int]]) -> int:
    """
    Returns the minimal path sum moving only right and down.
    matrix: a 2D list of integers.
    """
    rows = len(matrix)
    cols = len(matrix[0])
    
    # dp[i][j] will store the minimum path sum to cell (i, j)
    dp = [[0] * cols for _ in range(rows)]
    
    # Initialize starting point
    dp[0][0] = matrix[0][0]
    
    # Initialize first row (can only move right)
    for j in range(1, cols):
        dp[0][j] = dp[0][j-1] + matrix[0][j]
        
    # Initialize first column (can only move down)
    for i in range(1, rows):
        dp[i][0] = dp[i-1][0] + matrix[i][0]
        
    # Fill the rest of the dp table
    for i in range(1, rows):
        for j in range(1, cols):
            dp[i][j] = matrix[i][j] + min(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1])
            
    return dp[rows-1][cols-1]


if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Small example test
    test_grid = [
        [131, 673, 234],
        [201, 96, 342],
        [630, 803, 746]
    ]
    print(f"Minimal path sum: {solution(test_grid)}")
